## 1. Data Loading
data<-read.table("data/fig5/otu_norm.txt",header = T,sep="\t",row.names = 1)
map<-read.table("data/fig5/otu_alpha.txt",header = T,sep="\t",row.names = 1)
target_sites <- c("Stomach", "SmallIntestine", "LargeIntestine")
## 2. Define Target Sites
# Define the body sites to be processed in the loop
target_bs <- c("Stomach", "SmallIntestine", "LargeIntestine")
g1<-list()
## 3. Batch PCoA Processing Loop
for (bs_name in target_bs) {
  message(">>> Processing PCoA for site: ", bs_name)
  library(vegan)
  # Filter metadata for the current body site
  use_map <- map[map$BS == bs_name, ]
  
  if (nrow(use_map) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No data found for site:", bs_name))
    next
  }
  
  use_data <- data[, rownames(use_map)]
  otus <- as.data.frame(t(use_data))
  dist_mat <- as.matrix(vegdist(otus, method = 'bray', binary = F))
  pcoa_res <- cmdscale(dist_mat, k = 3, eig = T)
  mds_point <- data.frame(pcoa_res$points)
  colnames(mds_point) <- c("X1", "X2", "X3")
  eig <- pcoa_res$eig # Eigenvalues for variance explanation
  mds_point$Group <- use_map$pair_grp
  mds_point$site  <- use_map$site
  # Ensure "mucosa" is the first level and "lumen" is the second for consistent coloring
  grps <- unique(mds_point$Group)
  mucosa_label <- grps[grepl("mucosa", grps, ignore.case = T)]
  lumen_label  <- grps[grepl("lumen", grps, ignore.case = T)]
  mds_point$Group <- factor(mds_point$Group, levels = rev(c(mucosa_label, lumen_label)))
  g <- ggplot(mds_point, aes(x = X1, y = X2, col = Group)) +
    # Points with shapes mapped to 'site'
    geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2, stroke = 0.2, aes(shape = site)) +
    stat_ellipse(level = 0.65, lwd = 0.3, aes(col = Group)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#065535", "#f2622a")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15, 18, 3, 4, 8, 1, 2)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
      axis.title = element_text(color = 'black', size = 9),
      legend.position = "none" 
    ) +
    # Dynamic labels with variance percentage
    labs(
      x = paste0("PCoA 1 (", format(100 * eig[1] / sum(eig), digits = 4), "%)"),
      y = paste0("PCoA 2 (", format(100 * eig[2] / sum(eig), digits = 4), "%)"),
      title = paste("PCoA analysis -", bs_name)
    )
  g1[[bs_name]]<-g
}
plot_locom_bar <- function(locom_file){
  
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  
  # -------------------------------
  # 1. Read LOCOM result table
  # -------------------------------
  data <- read.table(locom_file,
                     header = TRUE,
                     sep = "\t",
                     check.names = FALSE,
                     comment.char = "")
  
  # -------------------------------
  # 2. Filter significant features
  # -------------------------------
  data <- data[data$RelativeAbundance > 0.001 &
                 data$Prevalence > 0.2 &
                 abs(data$log2FC) > 2, ]
  # 3. Load taxonomy annotation
  tax <- read.table("data/fig5/phylum_species.txt",header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
  use_tax <- tax[tax$Species %in% data$otu.name, ]
  # 4. Load phylum color mapping
  phylum <- read.table("data/fig5/phylum_color.txt",header = TRUE, sep = "\t",comment.char = "")
  # Manually adjust color for specific phylum
  phylum$color[phylum$Phylum == "p__Ascomycota"] <- "black"
  # -------------------------------
  # 5. Map phylum colors to taxa
  # -------------------------------
  use_tax$col <- NA
  
  for(i in 1:nrow(use_tax)){
    use_tax$col[i] <- phylum$color[
      phylum$Phylum == use_tax$Phylum[i]
    ]
  }
  rownames(use_tax) <- use_tax$Species
  use_tax <- use_tax[data$otu.name, ]
  data$col <- use_tax$col
  # 6. Order taxa by effect size
  data$otu.name <- factor(
    data$otu.name,
    levels = data$otu.name[order(data$effect.size)]
  )
  # 7. Define group based on log2FC
  data$Group <- ifelse(data$log2FC > 0,
                       "mucosa",
                       "lumen")
  # 8. Generate bar plot
  p <- ggplot(data,
              aes(x = otu.name,
                  y = effect.size,
                  fill = Group)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_classic() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#065535", "#f2622a")) +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(
        colour = data$col[order(data$effect.size)],
        size = 8,
        face = "bold"
      ),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.line.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(x = "")
  
  return(p)
}
###Figure 5C
g2 <- plot_locom_bar("data/fig5/stomach_mucosa_lumen_locom.txt")
g3 <- plot_locom_bar("data/fig5/SI_mucosa_lumen_locom.txt")
g4 <- plot_locom_bar("data/fig5/LI_mucosa_lumen_locom.txt")
